name: Idle Colors
short_description: Strategize with 8 unique currencies, each with upgradable production chains. Master triple prestige systems, evolve your economy, upgrade generators tiers, optimize through conversion, and dominate leaderboards in this deep idle experience.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in Idle Colors, a strategic idle game where every shade of progress matters! Manage seven distinct currencies, each with its own upgradable generators, and unlock the supreme meta-currency to purchase game-changing global upgrades.

Features:

🌈 Seven Unique Currencies – Seven unique currencies, each with dedicated, upgradeable generators and one ultimate super currency!

⚙ 100 Generators per Color – Expand your production with up to 100 generators for each currency, each boosting your income exponentially.

⚡ Prestige System – Reset your progress in three different ways to gain permanent boosts and reach new heights.

🚀 Evolution Mechanic – Unlock higher generator levels and break through previous limits by evolving your production lines.

📈 Tier System – Progress through tiers to gain massive production boosts and unlock new gameplay layers.

🔁 Currency Converter – Exchange one color’s currency for another to optimize your strategy and balance production.

🔓 Content Progression – New mechanics and content reveal themselves as you play.

⚙️ Automation — Free yourself from routine tasks, automate basic purchases and upgrades.

🎯 Global Goals – Complete ultimate objectives to conquer the game!

🏆 Leaderboards & Stats – Compete with other players, track your efficiency, and analyze detailed statistics to perfect your strategy.

🎨 Vibrant Visuals – A clean, colorful UI that makes managing your empire a pleasure.

Endless Strategy, Infinite Fun!

Whether you're a hardcore idler or a casual player, Idle Colors offers a perfect mix of depth, progression, and satisfying optimization. How far can you push your empire? Start your idle journey now!

Wishlist now on Steam! 🎮✨
